steps: Go to https://app.pagerduty.com/api_keys (or navigate to Integrations > Developer Tools > API Access Keys)
Log in with your PagerDuty account (Admin or Account Owner role required)
Enter a descriptive name for your key
Choose key type: General Access (full account access) or User Token (profile-level)
Click 'Create Key' and copy the key immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your PagerDuty REST API key (general access or user token)

notes: Admins and Account Owners can create general access REST API keys
Regular users can create personal user tokens via User Icon > My Profile > User Settings > API Access
API key is shown only once — copy and store it securely
Use the header format: Authorization: Token token=<api_key>
Free trial available; paid plans start from ~$21/user/month
Read-only keys are available for monitoring integrations

test_endpoint.description: List all users in the PagerDuty account
